description: ScoutLane font pairings. All fonts are Microsoft Office / Windows core — they render identically in Office on Windows and parse cleanly in ATS. The .docx always specifies the real MS font names listed here. Linux metric-twins (Caladea, Carlito, Gelasio, Tinos, EB Garamond) are preview-only and must NEVER appear in output documents.

pairs.name: Cambria / Calibri
pairs.head: Cambria
pairs.character: Warm professional — a classic serif heading paired with a humanist sans body. The default ScoutLane look: authoritative without stiffness.

pairs.name: Georgia / Verdana
pairs.head: Georgia
pairs.character: Legible classic — Georgia's serifs give headings weight; Verdana's wide letterforms maximize body readability at small sizes. Reliable across contexts.

pairs.name: Garamond / Calibri
pairs.head: Garamond
pairs.character: Refined executive — Garamond's old-style elegance in the heading, Calibri's clean modernity in the body. The contrast signals depth and polish.

pairs.name: Constantia / Corbel
pairs.head: Constantia
pairs.character: Modern polished — two Vista-era ClearType faces designed to work together. Constantia's curved serifs paired with Corbel's geometric sans reads fresh and considered.

pairs.name: Calibri / Calibri
pairs.head: Calibri
pairs.character: Clean minimal — one typeface throughout. The heading weight differentiates levels; nothing competes for attention. Pure function.

pairs.name: Times New Roman / Arial
pairs.head: Times New Roman
pairs.character: Bulletproof traditional — the two most universally supported typefaces. Zero style risk; parses in every ATS without question. Conservative by design.

pairs.name: Trebuchet MS / Georgia
pairs.head: Trebuchet MS
pairs.character: Friendly credible — Trebuchet's humanist geometry in the heading feels approachable, Georgia's serifs in the body keep it grounded and readable.

pairs.name: Book Antiqua / Tahoma
pairs.head: Book Antiqua
pairs.character: Executive warmth — Book Antiqua's old-world serif gravitas paired with Tahoma's clean, legible sans. Authoritative but approachable.

pairs.name: Palatino Linotype / Franklin Gothic Medium
pairs.head: Palatino Linotype
pairs.character: Distinctive premium — Palatino's calligraphic elegance against Franklin Gothic's assertive weight. The pairing has presence; best when the role calls for it.

pairs.name: Tahoma / Tahoma
pairs.head: Tahoma
pairs.character: High-legibility technical — Tahoma's pixel-hinted design maximizes clarity at all sizes. One face, engineered for readability. Functional and no-frills.
